case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LUIS ALONSO LAGOS MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-25-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT LUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT LUIS ALONSO LAGOS MARTINEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, LUIS ALONSO LAGOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC., REPRESENTED BY MARIA SUZANNA BARRAZA-SALAS, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST, CALLS THE COURT PRIOR TO TODAY HEARING TO INFORM THE COURT THAT SHE IS UNABLE TO APPEAR AT TODAYS HEARING ON TIME DUE TO TRAFFIC CONDITIONS. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS THE THE CASE BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELLE MCGILL; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
